'''vasodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanurate|cyanurate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanurate|cyanurate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vasodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væsedeth|væsedeth]] || [[word:væsedej|væsedej]] || [[word:væsedesh|væsedesh]] || [[word:væsede|væsede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vasosodoth|vasosodoth]] || [[word:vasosodoj|vasosodoj]] || [[word:vasosodosh|vasosodosh]] || [[word:vasosodo|vasosodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vasodoth|vasodoth]] || [[word:vasodoj|vasodoj]] || [[word:vasodosh|vasodosh]] || [[word:vasodo|vasodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vasofdoth|vasofdoth]] || [[word:vasofdoj|vasofdoj]] || [[word:vasofdosh|vasofdosh]] || [[word:vasofdof|vasofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vasodotho|vasodotho]] || [[word:vasodojo|vasodojo]] || [[word:vasodosho|vasodosho]] || [[word:vasodoko|vasodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vasodoth|vasodoth]] || [[word:vasodoj|vasodoj]] || [[word:vasodosh|vasodosh]] || [[word:vasodo|vasodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vasodothol|vasodothol]] || [[word:vasodojol|vasodojol]] || [[word:vasodoshol|vasodoshol]] || [[word:vasodokol|vasodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vasodothotho|vasodothotho]] || [[word:vasodojojo|vasodojojo]] || [[word:vasodoshosho|vasodoshosho]] || [[word:vasodoko|vasodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vasodothon|vasodothon]] || [[word:vasodojon|vasodojon]] || [[word:vasodoshon|vasodoshon]] || [[word:vasodokon|vasodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vasodothoro|vasodothoro]] || [[word:vasodojoro|vasodojoro]] || [[word:vasodoshoro|vasodoshoro]] || [[word:vasodokoro|vasodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
